node.title: Uber | Onsite | Mycalendar 1 and bus routes

topic.title: Uber | Onsite | Mycalendar 1 and bus routes

post.content:
* There was an online assessment with 2 questions, I can't recall the questions for that.


**ONSITE**
Two questions were asked, one is each round:
* Uber 1st round: https://leetcode.com/problems/my-calendar-i/
It was a variation where, we had multiple rooms and an interval was given, we had to return a room number which was empty at that time.

* Uber 2nd round: https://leetcode.com/problems/bus-routes/

System Design: Design a youtube like video platform that updates views in real time

The last was hiring manager round.
Is the SD round design Youtube as a whole or just the view count (top k) of videos?
1st round seems like to be the machine round, if this was for sde2.\nThough question looks simple for sde2.

Hi there!
If you could please edit the post title to the following layout: Company Name | Stage (Phone, Onsite, OA) | Question name
We ask that you can follow these guidelines [here](https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/126698/How-to-write-an-Interview-Question-post), thank you!
So there was only two rounds? if more rounds can you please update details for that also?
